name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES participants, votes, decisions



(* State variables *)
participants \in Seq(1..N)
votes \in Seq(1..N) \cup <<>>
decisions \in Seq(1..N) \cup <<>>

(* Helper predicates *)
AllParticipants(p) == p \in Seq(1..N)
AllVotes(v) == v \in Seq(1..N) \cup <<>>
AllDecisions(d) == d \in Seq(1..N) \cup <<>>

AllYes(v) == \A i \in 1..N : i \in v

(* Actions *)
PrepareAll(p) == /\ p = participants
                 /\ votes' = <<>>
                 /\ decisions' = <<>>
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<participants>>

WaitForVotes(p) == /\ p = participants
                 /\ votes' = Append(votes, i)
                 /\ decisions' = decisions
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<participants>>

SendVoteYes(i) == /\ i \in participants
                 /\ votes' = Append(votes, i)
                 /\ decisions' = decisions
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<participants>>

SendVoteNo(i) == /\ i \in participants
                 /\ votes' = <<>>
                 /\ decisions' = decisions
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<participants>>

CommitAll(p) == /\ p = participants
               /\ decisions' = Append(decisions, Commit)
               /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, votes>>

AbortAll(p) == /\ p = participants
              /\ decisions' = Append(decisions, Abort)
              /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, votes>>

WaitForDecision(i) == /\ i \in participants
                    /\ decisions' = decisions
                    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, votes>>

Commit(i) == /\ i \in participants
            /\ decisions' = Append(decisions, Commit)
            /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, votes>>

Abort(i) == /\ i \in participants
           /\ decisions' = Append(decisions, Abort)
           /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, votes>>

(* Next action *)
Next == \/ /\ PrepareAll(participants)
        \/ /\ WaitForVotes(participants)
        \/ /\ SendVoteYes(i)
        \/ /\ SendVoteNo(i)
        \/ /\ CommitAll(participants)
        \/ /\ AbortAll(participants)
        \/ /\ WaitForDecision(i)
        \/ /\ Commit(i)
        \/ /\ Abort(i)

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ participants = <<1, 2, ..., N>>
       /\ votes = <<>>
       /\ decisions = <<>>

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, votes, decisions>>

(* Type invariants *)
TypeOK == /\ participants \in Seq(1..N)
          /\ votes \in Seq(1..N) \cup <<>>
          /\ decisions \in Seq(1..N) \cup <<>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* forks is a set of integers from 1 to N *)
(* states is a function from 1..N to {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)

Init == /\ forks = 1..N
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ states[i] = "thinking"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = "free"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = "occupied"]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks[i] = "occupied"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = "free"]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active, r

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = 0

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = 0
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers
          /\ r' \in 1..10
          /\ r' \notin readers
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)
        \/ /\ writer_active = 0
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers
          /\ r' \in 1..10
          /\ r' \in readers
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)
        \/ /\ writer_active = 0
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers
          /\ r' \in 1..10
          /\ r' \notin readers
          /\ writer_active' = 1
          /\ readers' = readers
        \/ /\ writer_active = 1
          /\ r' \in 1..10
          /\ r' \notin readers
          /\ writer_active' = 0
          /\ readers' = readers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values
VARIABLES kv, lastPut


(* kv is a partial function from Keys to Values *)
(* lastPut is a partial function from Keys to Values, recording the most recent value for each key *)

TypeOK ==
  /\ Keys \subseteq Nat
  /\ Values \subseteq Nat
  /\ kv \in [Keys -> Values]
  /\ lastPut \in [Keys -> Values]

Init ==
  /\ kv = [k \in Keys |-> 0]  (* initial value 0 for all keys *)
  /\ lastPut = [k \in Keys |-> 0]

Next ==
  \/ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
       /\ kv' = [kv EXCEPT ![k] = v]
       /\ lastPut' = [lastPut EXCEPT ![k] = v]
  \/ \E k \in Keys :
       /\ kv' = kv
       /\ lastPut' = lastPut

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<kv, lastPut>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_CAPACITY
VARIABLES channel, chunks, file, retransmitCount, sentChunks

Init ==
    /\ file = <<>>  (* The file is initially empty *)
    /\ chunks = <<>>  (* No chunks have been sent yet *)
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>  (* No chunks have been sent yet *)
    /\ retransmitCount = <<>>  (* No retransmissions yet *)
    /\ channel = <<>>  (* No messages in the channel yet *)

Next ==
    \/ \E chunk \in Seq(1..CHUNK_SIZE) :  (* Generate a chunk of data *)
        /\ chunks' = Append(chunks, chunk)
        /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, chunk)
        /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, 0)
        /\ channel' = Append(channel, chunk)
    \/ \E i \in 1..Len(sentChunks) :  (* Retransmit a chunk *)
        /\ retransmitCount[i] < MAX_RETRIES
        /\ channel' = Append(channel, sentChunks[i])
        /\ retransmitCount' = [j \in 1..Len(retransmitCount) |-> IF j = i THEN retransmitCount[j] + 1 ELSE retransmitCount[j]]
    \/ \E i \in 1..Len(channel) :  (* Receive a chunk *)
        /\ channel' = Tail(channel)
        /\ file' = Append(file, channel[i])
    \/ \E i \in 1..Len(channel) :  (* Drop a chunk *)
        /\ channel' = Tail(channel)
        /\ file' = file
        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channel>>
